arts.ttl: Newcastle Agree Transfer for Aston Villa’s Jacob Ramsey at £39m Plus Add-Ons
arts.sum: Newcastle United have reached an agreement with Aston Villa to sign midfielder Jacob Ramsey in a deal worth up to £44 million. According to The Athletic, the agreement includes an upfront payment of £39 million plus £5 million in performance-based add-ons. The 24-year-old will travel to the north east on Thursday to undergo a medical, […]
